title: I Need You: 53 Years of the Band America
original_title: I Need You: 53 Years of the Band America
overview: After 53 consecutive years of touring and over 5,000 electrifying performances, the iconic duo of 'America' privately says goodbye to a lifetime together on the road. The film dives into their extraordinary journey and the profound decision that marks the end of a musical era.
